name: Health & Nutrition
description: Look up nutritional information for foods, get dietary recommendations, track macros, search recipes by nutritional constraints, and access exercise and wellness data. Uses free Open Food Facts and Nutritionix APIs.

tools_summary.name: search_food
tools_summary.description: Search for a food or dish and get full nutritional breakdown (calories, macros, vitamins)

tools_summary.name: get_nutrients
tools_summary.description: Get detailed nutrient data for a specific food by barcode or name

tools_summary.name: calculate_daily_needs
tools_summary.description: Calculate daily caloric and macro needs based on age, weight, height, and activity level

tools_summary.name: search_recipes
tools_summary.description: Find healthy recipes matching dietary requirements (vegan, keto, high-protein, etc.)

tools_summary.name: get_exercise_calories
tools_summary.description: Estimate calories burned for a given exercise activity and duration

tools_summary.name: get_bmi
tools_summary.description: Calculate BMI and provide healthy weight range for given height

setup_instructions:
For basic food lookups: no API key needed (uses Open Food Facts free API).
For natural language food queries and branded items:
1. Sign up at developer.nutritionix.com (free tier: 500 requests/day)
2. Create an app to get your App ID and API Key
3. Set NUTRITIONIX_APP_ID and NUTRITIONIX_API_KEY
_note: Open Food Facts is completely free and provides 2M+ food products. Nutritionix adds natural language processing for food queries like 'a slice of pizza' and branded restaurant items.
